data.content: Fixed token usage misattribution in wave sessions. The root cause was terminal-manager-initial-child.ts:110-112 using prepared.waveBeatIds (all child beat IDs) as sessionBeatIds when effectiveParent was true. This caused logTokenUsageForEvent to duplicate the same turn.completed token counts across every child beat. Fix: sessionBeatIds is now always [beatId], attributing tokens to the single beat that consumed the agent turn. Tests updated: agent-token-usage.test.ts now asserts single-beat attribution instead of multi-beat duplication; terminal-manager-knots-parent.test.ts updated to match. All quality gates pass: lint (pre-existing warning only), tsc --noEmit clean, 207 test files / 2362 tests pass, build succeeds. Branch: feat/foolery-81ad, commit: 290bf452e2fb.
